title: medicago hispida var. aculeata
intro: Medicago hispida var. aculeata is a plant species commonly known as the prickly medic or bur medic, which is a variant of the medusa head clover. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Medicago hispida var. aculeata include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
